title: Cosmic Echoes
prompt:
Create a modern 184-second Nu Disco song for a web radio / web TV broadcast. 

Mood: Energetic, Uplifting, Euphoric
Tempo: 120 BPM.
Style: Clean, modern production with a driving beat, shimmering synths, and a touch of retro flair.
Production: Radio-ready, streaming-ready, pristine mix, dynamic range.
Instruments: Synthesizers (pads, leads, bass), electric guitar (clean, funky rhythm), drum machine (four-on-the-floor kick, crisp snares, hi-hats), bass guitar (pulsating, melodic), layered vocal samples.

Structure:
0:00 - 0:14 intro: Gradual build-up with shimmering synth pads and a subtle, driving bassline. Introduce a rhythmic, filtered vocal sample.
0:14 - 0:51 verse/groove: Introduce the main drum beat and funky electric guitar rhythm. Bassline becomes more prominent. Vocal begins, telling a story of finding connection amidst the vastness of space.
0:51 - 1:09 build/pre-chorus: Increase energy with a rising synth line and layered percussion. Vocal becomes more urgent, building towards the chorus.
1:09 - 1:46 chorus/drop/main hook: Explosive chorus with a driving beat, layered synths, and catchy vocal melody. Emphasis on a memorable hook that is instantly recognizable.
1:46 - 2:23 second verse or soft bridge: Slightly stripped-down arrangement compared to the chorus. Vocal introduces a reflective element, contemplating the beauty of the universe. The instrumentation includes a subtle arpeggiated synth.
2:23 - 2:56 final chorus/drop/main hook: Return of the full energy of the chorus with additional vocal harmonies and synth textures.
2:56 - 3:04 final chorus continues with smooth fade out: Chorus melody continues to play as the track slowly fades out.

Vocals:
Male vocalist, clean and clear, with a modern pop delivery. Harmonies are layered in the chorus.

Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Lost in the starlight, a million miles away
Searching for a signal, hoping it will stay
Across the cosmos, a flicker in the night
A guiding constellation, shining ever bright

[Build]
Feel the rhythm calling, a pulse within the soul
Let the music take you, lose all self-control

[Chorus]
Cosmic echoes ringing, through the endless space
Finding connection, in this sacred place
Let the light surround you, lift you to the sky
Cosmic echoes calling, as the moments fly

[Verse 2]
Nebula dancing, painting skies so grand
Whispers of creation, held within your hand
Across the universe, a symphony untold
A tapestry of wonder, brave and bold

The final 8 seconds must fade out smoothly and naturally. No abrupt ending. No spoken outro.

Negative prompt: low quality, distorted vocals, out of tune vocals, bad timing, messy mix, muddy bass, harsh highs, old-fashioned arrangement, theatrical singing, opera vocals, excessive vibrato, abrupt ending, spoken outro, crackle, noise, clipping, overcompressed, random tempo changes, long silence.
